projects_mobile.title: PhotoFest
projects_mobile.impact: Facilitated real-time collection of +500 photos at social events without app installation, democratizing access to digital memories.
projects_mobile.description: Real-time platform for uploading photos at social events without registration.
projects_mobile.challenge: Allowing massive concurrent uploads and real-time viewing without a complex backend.
projects_mobile.solution: Serverless-like architecture using MongoDB as DB and Cloudinary for media.

projects_mobile.title: Citrus-Track
projects_mobile.impact: Total centralization of citrus logistics, reducing dispatch times by 40% and eliminating manual stock errors through digital traceability.
projects_mobile.description: Comprehensive management system for the citrus industry that centralizes logistics and processing. Solves the lack of visibility in the supply chain by connecting reception, packing, and dispatch.
projects_mobile.challenge: The industry faced logistic invisibility (transport-cargo disconnection), manual stock management with human errors, lack of unified traceability, and communication delays between plant and drivers.
projects_mobile.solution: Adapted MERN platform (React, Node, Express, MySQL) with WebSockets for live monitoring. Includes modules for digital reception, pallet traceability with QR, logistics with Google Maps, and KPI dashboard.

projects_mobile.title: Academic Management
projects_mobile.impact: 100% digitalization of the institute's academic processes, enabling early detection of low performance and improving communication with guardians.
projects_mobile.description: Comprehensive management system for the Carlos Guido Spano Institute. Digitalizes student, course, and attendance administration, replacing manual paper processes and centralizing academic and disciplinary information.
projects_mobile.challenge: Manual management (paper) prone to errors and loss, difficulty accessing histories, lack of automatic reports, and limited/inefficient communication with guardians.
projects_mobile.solution: Modular web platform with roles (Admin, Teacher, Preceptor) developed in React and Node.js. Includes real-time attendance management, grade recording, automatic certificate/report generation, and digital notifications to guardians.

projects_desktop.title: PhotoFest
projects_desktop.impact: Facilitated real-time collection of +500 photos at social events without app installation, democratizing access to digital memories.
projects_desktop.description: Collaborative real-time photo gallery for weddings and parties. Guests upload photos via QR without installing apps.
projects_desktop.challenge: Create a low-cost but high-performance system to handle hundreds of concurrent uploads during events.
projects_desktop.solution: Lightweight backend with Node.js orchestrating Cloudinary (Image CDN) and using MongoDB as an effective NoSQL database.

why_custom.title: Why Choose Custom Software?
why_custom.scalability_desc: Built to grow with your business, not limit it. No license fees per user.
